info.title: Edictum Console
info.description: Self-hostable agent operations console -- runtime governance for AI agents

get.description:
Public health check. Returns minimal info — no auth required.

Only exposes operational status and bootstrap state (needed by
the setup wizard before any user exists).

Authenticated health check with full operational details.

Returns version, infrastructure status, worker health, and connected
agent count. Requires dashboard session cookie. Returns 503 when degraded.
Liveness probe. Returns 200 if the process is running.

schema.title: Response Health Live Api V1 Health Live Get

get.description: Readiness probe. Returns 200 if Postgres and Redis are reachable, 503 otherwise.

post.description:
Create the first admin user and tenant.

Only works when no users exist (bootstrap lock -- S7).
Returns 409 if already bootstrapped.
Authenticate with email/password, receive session cookie.
Destroy session and clear cookie.

get.description: Return current user info from session.
List all non-revoked API keys for the authenticated tenant.

schema.title: Response List Keys Api V1 Keys Get

post.description:
Create a new API key for the authenticated tenant.

Only available to dashboard-authenticated users.
The full key is returned once and cannot be retrieved again.

delete.description:
Revoke an API key by setting its revoked_at timestamp.

Only the owning tenant (via dashboard auth) can revoke their keys.

post.description: Upload a new contract bundle (dashboard-authenticated users).

get.description:
List distinct bundle names with summaries.

Accessible by both dashboard users and API key agents (for gate init).
When accessed via API key, only bundles deployed to the key's environment
are returned.

schema.title: Response List Bundles Api V1 Bundles Get

get.description:
Get the currently deployed bundle for a (name, env) pair.

Returns bundle metadata plus the YAML content (base64-encoded) so
agents can parse and enforce contracts. Accessible by both API-key
agents and dashboard-authenticated users.

API key auth: the ``env`` query param must match the key's scope.
List all versions for a named bundle, newest first.

schema.title: Response List Versions Api V1 Bundles  Name  Get

get.description:
Get a specific bundle version.

API key auth: only returns bundles that are deployed to the key's env.

Get the raw YAML content of a bundle version.

API key auth: only returns bundles that are deployed to the key's env.

post.description: Deploy a bundle version to an environment (dashboard-authenticated).

get.description: List all bundle compositions for this tenant.

schema.title: Response List Compositions Endpoint Api V1 Compositions Get

post.description: Create a new bundle composition.

get.description: Get composition detail with contract items.

delete.description: Delete a composition (SET NULL on bundles.composition_id).

post.description: Assemble and return YAML without deploying.
Assemble, sign, deploy, and push a composed bundle.
Import contracts from a YAML bundle (top-down decomposition).

get.description: List contracts in the library (latest versions only).

schema.title: Response List Contracts Endpoint Api V1 Contracts Get

post.description: Create a new contract in the library.

get.description: Get contract details (latest version + version history).

put.description: Update a contract (creates a new version).

delete.description: Delete a contract (all versions). Fails if referenced by a composition.

get.description: Get a specific version of a contract.
List bundle compositions that use this contract.

schema.title: Response Get Contract Usage Endpoint Api V1 Contracts  Contract Id  Usage Get

post.description:
Evaluate a tool call against YAML contracts (dashboard playground).

This is a development-time endpoint for testing contracts in the dashboard.
It is never called by agents during production execution.
Evaluation runs in a thread with a timeout to prevent DoS via complex YAML.
Concurrent evaluations are capped to prevent thread pool exhaustion.

get.description: List deployments for the tenant, newest first.

schema.title: Response List Deployments Api V1 Deployments Get

get.description:
SSE endpoint for agents to receive real-time bundle updates.

Auto-registers the agent if not already known. Resolves bundle assignment
if agent didn't provide an explicit bundle_name.

The ``env`` query parameter must match the API key's environment scope.
A staging key cannot subscribe to production events.

SSE endpoint for the dashboard to receive real-time updates.

Uses cookie auth. Subscribes to ALL environments for the tenant.
Forwards approval_created, approval_decided, approval_timeout,
and contract_update events.

post.summary: Ingest a batch of audit events
post.description:
Accept a batch of audit events from an agent.

Duplicate events (same ``tenant_id`` + ``call_id``) are silently ignored.

get.description: Query audit events with optional filters.

schema.title: Response Get Events Api V1 Events Get

post.description: Read multiple keys from the session store in a single call.

get.description: Read a single key from the session store.

put.description: Write a string value to the session store.

delete.description: Remove a key from the session store.

post.description: Atomically increment a numeric session key.
Create a pending approval request (agent-facing).

schema.title: Response Create Approval Api V1 Approvals Post

get.description: List approvals, optionally filtered by status.

schema.title: Response List Approvals Api V1 Approvals Get

get.description:
Get a single approval by ID.

API key auth: only returns approvals from the key's environment.

put.description: Submit a human decision on a pending approval.

get.description:
Return aggregate stats for the dashboard home view.

API key auth: stats are scoped to the key's environment.
Return per-contract aggregated evaluation stats.

post.description: Handle Telegram callback webhooks for DB-configured channels.
Handle Discord interactions: PING handshake and component button clicks.
Handle Slack interactive component payloads (button clicks).

get.description:
Return the Slack App manifest with the interactivity URL pre-filled.

No auth required — the manifest contains no secrets.
Return live status of all connected agents for the tenant.
Return fleet-level coverage summary for all agents in tenant.
Return coverage analysis for a single agent.
Return contract change timeline and drift history for an agent.
List all registered agents for the tenant.

schema.title: Response List Registrations Api V1 Agent Registrations Get

patch.description: Update an agent's display name, tags, or explicit bundle assignment.

post.description: Assign a bundle to multiple agents at once.

get.description: List all assignment rules for the tenant, ordered by priority.

schema.title: Response List Rules Api V1 Assignment Rules Get

post.description: Create a new assignment rule.

get.description:
Preview which bundle an agent would receive (dry-run resolution).

When ``env`` is provided, only rules for that environment are considered.
When omitted, all tenant rules are evaluated (useful for dashboard previews).
List all notification channels for the authenticated tenant.

schema.title: Response List Channels Api V1 Notifications Channels Get

post.description: Create a new notification channel.
Send a test message through a notification channel.
Rotate the tenant's Ed25519 signing key and re-sign active deployments.

delete.description: Purge audit events older than the specified number of days.

parameters.name: older_than_days

schema.description: Delete events older than N days
schema.title: Older Than Days

parameters.description: Delete events older than N days

get.description: Get AI config for the current tenant (API key masked).

put.description: Create or update AI config. Encrypts API key before storage.

schema.title: Response Update Config Api V1 Settings Ai Put

delete.description: Delete AI config for the current tenant.

post.description: Test AI provider connectivity by sending a short prompt.
Stream AI-generated contract suggestions via SSE.

get.description: Get aggregated AI usage statistics for the current tenant.
Serve the React SPA — return index.html for all routes (client-side routing).

BatchGetResponse.description: Response for batch-reading multiple session keys.

BundleCurrentResponse.title: BundleCurrentResponse
BundleCurrentResponse.description:
Bundle response with YAML content for agent consumption.

Used by GET /{name}/current — agents need the actual contract YAML
to parse and enforce. The yaml_bytes field is base64-encoded.

BundleResponse.title: BundleResponse
BundleResponse.description: Serialized bundle returned by the API.

BundleSummaryResponse.title: BundleSummaryResponse
BundleSummaryResponse.description: Summary of a named bundle (for the bundle list).

BundleUploadRequest.title: BundleUploadRequest
BundleUploadRequest.description: Upload a new contract bundle (raw YAML string).

BundleWithDeploymentsResponse.title: BundleWithDeploymentsResponse
BundleWithDeploymentsResponse.description: Bundle response enriched with deployed environment names.

ChannelResponse.title: ChannelResponse
ChannelResponse.description:
Public-facing notification channel info.

The ``config`` dict is **redacted** — secret fields (tokens, passwords,
signing secrets) are masked.  Non-secret fields (chat IDs, URLs, usernames)
are returned as-is so the UI can display them.

ComposeDeployRequest.description: Request body for deploying a composed bundle.

ComposeDeployResponse.title: ComposeDeployResponse
ComposeDeployResponse.description: Response after assembling, signing, and deploying.

CompositionItemDetail.description: Detailed view of a contract within a composition.

CompositionItemInput.title: CompositionItemInput
CompositionItemInput.description: A contract reference within a composition.

CoverageSummary.title: CoverageSummary
